entry.title: New: RES25-161 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF REGISTRATION FEES VALUED AT $3,000 FROM THE INTERNATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF VENUE MANAGERS (IAVM) REGION 7 SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAM FOR A STAFF MEMBER OF THE DEPARTMENT OF ENTERPRISE SERVICES (DES) TO ATTEND THE 2025 ANNUAL VENUE MANAGEMENT SCHOOL YEAR 1 IN PALM SPRINGS, CALIFORNIA, JUNE 7-12, 2025.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
